<?php namespace Knuckles\Scribe\Attributes; use Attribute; #[Attribute(Attribute::IS_REPEATABLE | Attribute::TARGET_FUNCTION | Attribute::TARGET_METHOD | Attribute::TARGET_CLASS)] class Header { public function __construct( public string $name, public mixed $example = null ) { } public function toArray() { return [ "name" => $this->name, "example" => $this->example, ]; } }
